description_long: This object is a head of lettuce with a dense cluster of overlapping, broad green leaves forming a loosely packed rosette. The leaves are layered concentrically, with the outermost leaves spreading outward and the inner leaves more tightly grouped toward the center. The leaf surfaces are slightly undulating and display a matte, soft texture with visible veins and subtle color variations from light to medium green. The edges of the leaves are irregular and undulate, giving the lettuce a natural, organic appearance. The central rib of each leaf is only faintly visible, blending into the overall leafy mass. The lettuce appears fresh and unblemished, suitable for placement in urban environments such as markets, food stalls, or community gardens.
description: A loosely packed, green head of lettuce with overlapping, undulating leaves and a soft, matte texture.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rosette pattern and overlapping, undulating leaves with a dense center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outward spread of the outer leaves and the layered structure.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the open, bowl-like shape and the loose arrangement of the leaves.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the irregular, wavy leaf edges and the overall leafy mass.
attribute_leaf_arrangement: rosette, overlapping, loosely clustered toward the center
